gist.headline: The Daily Buzz
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date information and community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a newsie or updating a bulletin board alongside the Monitor Robot, representing the automated daily news update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board, while the bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
